title: Minimal bug fixes linking epic for parser validation, config consistency, and safety checks
description: Epic linking 5 small self-contained ready bug beads. Fixes add minimal checks/resets/validations per file purpose (regex, Kconfig, protobuf, types, lengths). Parallel explore+claim+fix+test+codereview. Idiomatic, no comments, vector exact, no test mods. Close on clean. Follows AGENTS.md review loop.
